title: Modified LSK109 Ligation Prep with Needle Shear and Bead Clean Up
author: John Tyson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7emhjc6

steps.title: 10 µg of HMW genomic DNA...
steps.instruction: 10 µg of HMW genomic DNA made up to 250 µL with EB and sheared with either a 29G or 26G needle using 20 passes. For 26G shear add 250 µL of EB (10mM Tris-Cl pH8.0) followed by 250 µL AMPureXP bead solution . For 29G shear add 125 µL AMPureXP bead solution . After shearing is a good time to get a reliable DNA quantification using the Qubit DNA HS kit etc.

steps.title: Mix by flicking
steps.instruction: Mix by flicking.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and keeping on the...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and keeping on the magnet wash 2x with 300 µL – 500 µL 80 % ethanol without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Removed tube from the magnet
steps.instruction: Removed tube from the magnet

steps.title: Place tube on magnet and remove...
steps.instruction: Place tube on magnet and remove eluted DNA sample to a fresh tube.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µL of the DNA...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µL of the DNA sample using the Qubit DNA HS kit to confirm DNA recovery (~ 6 µg ).

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:30:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:30:00 followed by 65 °C for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Add 120 µL EB buffer followed...
steps.instruction: Add 120 µL EB buffer followed by 72 µL AMPureXP bead solution .

steps.title: Mix by flicking
steps.instruction: Mix by flicking.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and keeping on the...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and keeping on the magnet wash 2x with 300 µL 80 % ethanol without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Remove tube from the magnet
steps.instruction: Remove tube from the magnet.

steps.title: Place tube on magnet and remove...
steps.instruction: Place tube on magnet and remove eluted DNA sample to a fresh tube.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µL DNA sample using...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µL DNA sample using the Qubit DNA HS kit to confirm DNA recovery (~ 4 µg – 5 µg ).

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C / Room temperature for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C / Room temperature for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Add 100 µL EB buffer followed...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL EB buffer followed by 80 µL AMPureXP bead solution .

steps.title: Mix by flicking
steps.instruction: Mix by flicking.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and keeping on the...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and keeping on the magnet wash 2x with 250 µL of LFB buffer by removing from the magnet and flicking, briefly spin, and pelleting again on the magnet.

steps.title: Remove tube from the magnet
steps.instruction: Remove tube from the magnet.

steps.title: Place tube on magnet and pellet beads
steps.instruction: Place tube on magnet and pellet beads.

steps.title: Quantify 1 µL DNA sample using...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µL DNA sample using the Qubit DNA HS kit to confirm DNA recovery (~ 2.5 µg ).

steps.title: Library ready to be combined with...
steps.instruction: Library ready to be combined with SQB and LLB for loading onto flowcel ( 200 ng – 400 ng per load).

steps.title: Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature followed by pelleting on a magnet.

steps.title: Briefly spin, return to magnet and...
steps.instruction: Briefly spin, return to magnet and remove any residual 80 % ethanol with a pipette before allowing the bead pellet to air dry for ~ 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Resuspend the bead pellet in 51 µL EB by flicking
steps.instruction: Resuspend the bead pellet in 51 µL EB by flicking.

steps.title: Spin down
steps.instruction: Spin down.

steps.title: Allow DNA to elute by incubation...
steps.instruction: Allow DNA to elute by incubation at 37 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Then set up the following End-Prep reaction
steps.instruction: Then set up the following End-Prep reaction: 50 µL DNA sample 7 µL Ultra II End-Prep Buffer 3 µL Ultra II End-Prep Enzyme mix

steps.title: Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature followed by pelleting on a magnet.

steps.title: Briefly spin
steps.instruction: Briefly spin.

steps.title: Return to magnet and remove any...
steps.instruction: Return to magnet and remove any residual 80 % ethanol with a pipette before allowing the bead pellet to air dry for ~ 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Resuspend the bead pellet in 67 µL EB by flicking
steps.instruction: Resuspend the bead pellet in 67 µL EB by flicking.

steps.title: Spin down and allow DNA to...
steps.instruction: Spin down and allow DNA to elute by incubation at °C for 00:05:00 with occasional flicking.

steps.title: Then set up the following Ligation reaction
steps.instruction: Then set up the following Ligation reaction: 66 µL DNA sample 25 µL LNB buffer 5 µL AMX adapter 4 µL Quick T4 DNA Ligase

steps.title: Briefly spin
steps.instruction: Briefly spin.

steps.title: Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature followed by pelleting on a magnet.

steps.title: Remove any residual LFB buffer while...
steps.instruction: Remove any residual LFB buffer while on the magnet with a pipette after final pelleting.

steps.title: Resuspend the bead pellet in 21...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the bead pellet in 21 µL ONT-EB buffer by flicking.

steps.title: Spin down and allow DNA to...
steps.instruction: Spin down and allow DNA to elute by incubation at 37 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Remove eluted DNA sample to a fresh tube
steps.instruction: Remove eluted DNA sample to a fresh tube.
